headline: Why Howmet (HWM) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company Howmet (NYSE:HWM) jumped 6.3% in the afternoon session after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, pausing a conflict that had sent equity prices reeling.

headline: Shares of aerospace and defense companies are trading higher as investors respond to the US-Iran ceasefire deal and President Trump's 15‑point cooperation plan, easing geopolitical tensions and boosting risk appetite.
